title: Fake Blockz Mod
description: Have a fake block to go through to make your secret base better for 1.20.1 Fabric and Forge!
body:
# Welcome to the Fake Blockz Mod
**The mod may update if I have any free time!**
## Description
This Mod adds fake blocks that can be walked through for your secret bases and many other uses you can do in 1.20.1 fabric!

## Features
- Added Fake Concreate Variants
- Added Fake Stripped Log Variants
- Added 3 Bricks Variants

## How to make a Fake Block?
![Supported Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6137fa8169adc42aa045cd04521da226e1b9c0f.png)
That was all of the blocks that you can turn into a fake block.

To make one you can put the supported block into a stone cutter to change it to a fake block!
